content.text: 请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

content.text: 请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

content.text:
The device is stuck on the AOD/lock screen and not responding to touch, swipe, or app launch commands. I cannot proceed with the task.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device is stuck on AOD/lock screen showing only the clock; touches, swipes, and open_app calls do not wake the screen or dismiss the keyguard.", "screenshot_paths": ["AOD lock screen with faint clock '01:1x' visible, rest of screen black; XML shows only com.android.systemui keyguard_root_view with no interactive content."], "failure_reason": "Device remained on the keyguard/AOD; multiple swipe-up unlock attempts and app launches did not wake or unlock the device, so SMS Messenger could not be opened to send the message."}

result:
The device is stuck on the AOD/lock screen and not responding to touch, swipe, or app launch commands. I cannot proceed with the task.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device is stuck on AOD/lock screen showing only the clock; touches, swipes, and open_app calls do not wake the screen or dismiss the keyguard.", "screenshot_paths": ["AOD lock screen with faint clock '01:1x' visible, rest of screen black; XML shows only com.android.systemui keyguard_root_view with no interactive content."], "failure_reason": "Device remained on the keyguard/AOD; multiple swipe-up unlock attempts and app launches did not wake or unlock the device, so SMS Messenger could not be opened to send the message."}
